title: Purple Torches
description: A small mod that adds purple torches and lanterns to Minecraft!
body:
A small **neoforge** mod that bravely asks: What if torches were purple?

## New additions

### Blocks

- Potash Ore
- Deepslate Potash Ore
- Potash Block
- Potash Torch
- Potash Lantern

### Items

- Potash Salt

## Guide

Potash ore spawns at Y levels 26 through -26, and requires at least a stone pickaxe to mine. Each ore will drop 2-4 potash salt, which is the prime ingredient in making your very own potash torches.

![Deepslate Potash Ore found underground.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76ce808199270947636b6556ee66f33f4c70cd9e.png)

Once you have potash salt, there are several ways to create potash torches. 

In a crafting table, you can surround 1 potash salt with 8 torches to craft 8 potash torches.

![Crafting 8 potash torches with 1 potash salt and 8 torches.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f61256f03c6b16ca35b117ae0dabefffb90f3fb7.png)

If you don't want to craft so many extra, you can craft 1 potash salt with 1 torch to create a single potash torch.

![Crafting 1 purple torch with 1 potash salt and 1 torch in a shapeless crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dcc0ea92d359def696dd73f7d14fd733f9ca674.png)

Alternatively, you can create a potash torch by simply right clicking a torch with potash salt in your hand.

If you're feeling extra decorative, you can use your potash torches to create a potash lantern by surrounding 1 potash torch with 8 iron nuggets.

![Player crafting a potash lantern with 8 iron ingots and 1 potash torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b44b6fbcaab06ade2483a4f9de4dcf08b816c05e.png)

### Additional mechanics

Potash salt can be used in a composter for a 65% chance to add a layer of compost.
